calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Helen Soprep-Matley 225 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Lisa Padilla, Esq. appearing on behalf of Plaintiff, Bay Citi Properties De, LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: Karen Duong, is present.

Defendants, Alfred Dejamco and JeamyLee Dejamco, are not present.

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assign from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Karen Duong is sworn and examined under direct examination by Lisa Padilla. The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1: Rental Agreement..............................................ID/EV
Exhibit 2: 3-Day Notice to Quit..........................................ID/EV
Exhibit 3: Proof of Service to 3-Day Notice to ..........................ID/EV

The Court after hearing the testimony and evidence presented by plaintiff, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants, Alfred Dejamco and JeamyLee Dejamco, as follows:

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 516 Ellis Street, Apartment 301, San Francisco, California. The rental agreement is forfeited. Plaintiff shall recover from defendants back rent in the sum of $2,329.47 and per diem damages in the sum of $2,652.80, for a total of $4,982.27 . Plaintiff waives attorney's fees and cost.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits. Judgment is submitted to the Court and signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218 Clerk: Anna Redigonda

Matter comes on calendar for Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Lisa Padilla appearing for Plaintiff with representative present.
Settlement Conference is ordered off calendar. No appearance by Defendant. Trial Date remains.
(Clerk only had temporary file at Settlement Conference)
(not reported)
